# Klienta Public

Public trust and discoverability hub for Klienta in the ByteWorthy product continuum.

- Public repository: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/klienta-public
- Canonical source repository: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/klienta
- Commercial homepage: https://byteworthy.io

## Product Continuum

- Sovra (open-source baseline): https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/sovra
- Klienta (paid agency baseline): https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/klienta
- Clynova (paid healthcare baseline): https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/clynova

## Public Trust Docs

- EULA: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/klienta-public/blob/main/EULA.md
- Terms: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/klienta-public/blob/main/TERMS.md
- Security: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/klienta-public/blob/main/SECURITY.md
- Sales Flow: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/klienta-public/blob/main/SALES-FLOW.md
